# SARF

> Interest-free, asset-backed commodity financing with no FICO score required. Approval is based on bank-verified income and cash-flow patterns. Built by Plug in Ventures, a fintech accelerator.

## About

- [Homepage](https://sarf.space/): Product overview, comparison vs SoFi/Upstart/LendingClub/Chase/BofA, repayment intelligence, FAQ, early access signup

## Compare

- [SARF vs Upstart](https://sarf.space/compare/upstart/): Cash-flow underwriting (no FICO required) vs AI-enhanced credit scoring. Approval basis, fee structure, and product fit.

## Key facts

- **Parent company:** Plug in Ventures (fintech accelerator)
- **Approval signal:** Bank-verified income and cash-flow, not FICO
- **Cost structure:** Always interest-free; total cost fixed and disclosed on day one
- **Fees:** $0 origination, $0 prepayment, $0 late-payment surcharges
- **Decision time:** Most applicants get a rate decision within 60 seconds
- **Repayment:** Auto-aligned with salary deposits, typically bi-weekly
- **Rate reduction:** Optional guarantor or collateral can reduce rate up to 3.5%
- **Security:** Bank-level encryption, read-only bank access, credentials never stored
- **Status:** Early access live
- **Contact:** contact@sarf.space

## Product mechanics

SARF buys a commodity on the customer's behalf and sells it to them at a fixed, agreed-upon price with deferred payment. The customer can keep the commodity or have SARF sell it for cash. Total cost is locked in upfront — no interest, no surprises. This is not a loan; it is asset-backed commodity financing.
